kernel_subject: of: net: add a helper for loading netdev->dev_addr
stage1_reason: Both commits explicitly migrate from deprecated kernel APIs (of_get_mac_address with direct dev_addr assignment) to new kernel APIs (of_get_ethdev_address and eth_hw_addr_set) due to kernel networking subsystem changes for Ethernet address management.
stage2_reason: Driver commit 8b6ce9b02672 migrates from of_get_mac_address to of_get_ethdev_address, directly matching kernel commit d466effe282d that introduces this helper. Driver commit 524b09ea34a4 uses eth_hw_addr_set() which is enabled by the new API pattern established in d466effe282d.
